page_metadata.biotools__summary: Software that searches the genomic sequences or mRNA sequences for frameshifting sites. It is capable of finding -1 frameshift sites for most known genes and +1 frameshift sites for two genes: protein chain release factor (prfB ) and ornithine decarboxylase antizyme (oaz ).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Software that searches the genomic sequences or mRNA sequences for frameshifting sites. It is capable of finding -1 frameshift sites for most known genes and +1 frameshift sites for two genes: protein chain release factor (prfB ) and ornithine decarboxylase antizyme (oaz ).
